title: Summary Hospital-level Mortality Indicator (SHMI) — historical trust-level data (release Oct 2024 - Sep 2025)
vintage: SHMI release for the reporting period October 2024 - September 2025 (published February 2026); the bundled historical file carries the as-published SHMI value, banding, and control limits for every rolling 12-month window back to Jan 2018 - Dec 2018.
notes: Accredited official statistic. The running variable is each trust's SHMI minus its overdispersed upper control limit (OD_UL); a trust is banded 'higher than expected' (band 1) exactly when SHMI > OD_UL. The outcome is the trust's SHMI in a later, non-overlapping window. PUBLICATION_MONTH gives the as-published vintage, so the banding reflects how trusts were actually flagged at decision time. Not vendored into git: fetch from download_uri (or the R2 mirror) into data/cache and verify against sha256.
